examples: The critical velocity, or critical Froude number criterion has long been accepted as a means of determining frazil jam profiles.
Ice jam flood: a lot of frazil ices and crushed ices gather under the covering ice, causing heading up of water level of upper reach.
Later that afternoon I went to another lecture, about ice, in all its varieties: frazil, grease, brash, shuga, pancake, white, drift, rafting and fast.
